case_title: JONES MEMORIAL HOMES, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION VS. BETTY FIGGINS et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS
SUMMONS RETURNED FILED BY PLAINTIFF JONES MEMORIAL HOMES, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION ON DEFENDANT FIGGINS, BETTY

PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS, COMPLAINT & PREJUDGMENT CLAIM FILED BY PLAINTIFF JONES MEMORIAL HOMES, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION SERVED JAN-17-2003, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 30, INCLUSIVE

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JONES MEMORIAL HOMES, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FIGGINS, BETTY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2045 SUTTER ST. #205, S.F. CA., INCLUDING ALL TENANTS, SUBTENANTS AND OTHER OCCUPANTS, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT.
ORDER GRANTING IN PART AND DENYING WITHOUT PREJUDICE IN PART MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS.

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JONES MEMORIAL HOMES, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT FIGGINS, BETTY DOES 1 TO 30, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
